zh.of Philadelphia,Alasehir,Manisa,Turkey: 土耳其馬尼沙阿拉申爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isaak Angelos於1117年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾時，他的父親Constantine Angelos24歲，母親Theodōra Komnēnos21歲。他於大約1155年與Mrs Isaak Angelos在土耳其易斯坦波爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1170年享年53歲。

zh-hans.of Philadelphia,Alasehir,Manisa,Turkey: 土耳其馬尼沙阿拉申爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isaak Angelos于1117年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾时，他的父亲Constantine Angelos24岁，母亲Theodōra Komnēnos21岁。他于大约1155年与Mrs Isaak Angelos在土耳其易斯坦波爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1170年享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Angelos
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Spiro, Alexandros, Constantine, Manos, Nikolaos, Stavros, Vasilios.

American shortened form of Greek patronymics such as Angelopoulos , derived from the personal name Angelos, which is from angelos (in Greek transliteration aggelos) ‘messenger, angel’ or a short form of the personal name Euangelos ‘bringer of good news’ (see Evangelista ). Compare Angelis .

variants.name: Angelides
meanings: Greek: patronymic from the personal name Angelos (see Angelos ). The suffix -ides, meaning ‘son/descendant of’, is classical, and was revived in the 19th century, in particular by Greeks from Asia Minor and Eastern Thrace.

variants.name: Angelopoulos
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Andreas, Dimitrios, Angelos, Athanasia, Kostas, Nikolaos, Pericles, Spyridon, Spyros, Thanos, Vassilis.
Greek: patronymic from the personal name Angelos (see Angelos ) + the ending -poulos (from Latin pullus ‘nestling, chick’), which occurs chiefly in the Peloponnese.

variants.name: Angelakis
meanings: Greek: patronymic from the personal name Angelos (see Angelos ) + the diminutive suffix -akis, which is particularly typical for the surnames from Crete, where it was adopted massively in the 19th century.

variants.name: Angelis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Konstantinos, Antonios, Athina, Christos, Dimitrios, Efthimios, Eleftherios, Georgios, Konstantino, Sevasti, Stratis.  Italian Angelo, Lia.

Greek: from a derivative of the personal name Angelos (see Angelos ), or a shortened form of any of various patronymics derived from this name. Standard Greek transliteration of this surname is Aggelis.
Shortened form of Italian   De Angelis  .

nameMeanings.name: Isaak
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the son of Abraham, who was nearly sacrificed by his father according to a command of God which was changed at the last moment. A ram, caught in a nearby thicket, was sacrificed instead (Genesis 22:1–13). Isaac lived on to marry Rebecca and become the father of Esau and Jacob. The derivation of the name is not certain; it has traditionally been connected with the Hebrew verb meaning ‘to laugh’. It was borne by both Christians and Jews in the Middle Ages and was taken up by the Puritans in the 16th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Isaak Angelos was born in 1117, in İstanbul, Türkiye, his father, Constantine Angelos, was 24 and his mother, Theodōra Komnēnos, was 21. He married Mrs Isaak Angelos about 1155, in İstanbul, Türkiye. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1170, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isaak Angelos est né en 1117, à İstanbul, Turquie, son père, Constantine Angelos, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Theodōra Komnēnos, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Isaak Angelos environ 1155, à İstanbul, Turquie. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1170, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isaak Angelos 1117 in İstanbul, Türkei geboren wurde, war sein Vater Constantine Angelos 24 und seine Mutter Theodōra Komnēnos 21. Er hat um 1155 in İstanbul, Türkei Mrs Isaak Angelos geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1170 im Alter von 53 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isaak Angelos è nato il nel 1117 nel İstanbul, Turchia, il suo padre, Constantine Angelos, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Theodōra Komnēnos, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Isaak Angelos circa 1155, nel İstanbul, Turchia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1170, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.of Philadelphia,Alasehir,Manisa,Turkey: トルコマニサアラsエヒル
ja.lifeSummary: Isaak Angelosが1117年にトルコイスタンブルで生まれた時，父Constantine Angelosは24歳，母Theodōra Komnēnosは21歳であった。約1155年にトルコイスタンブルでMrs Isaak Angelosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1170年に53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isaak Angelos(이)가 1117년 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Constantine Angelos(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Theodōra Komnēnos(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1155년 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 Mrs Isaak Angelos(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1170년 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isaak Angelos nasceu em 1117, em İstanbul, Turquia, seu pai, Constantine Angelos, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Theodōra Komnēnos, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Isaak Angelos aproximadamente 1155, em İstanbul, Turquia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1170, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isaak Angelos родился в 1117 г. в местности истанбул, Турция, его отцу по имени Constantine Angelos было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Theodōra Komnēnos, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Isaak Angelos около 1155 г. в местности истанбул, Турция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1170 г. в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isaak Angelos nació en 1117, en İstanbul, Turquía, su papá, Constantine Angelos, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Theodōra Komnēnos, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Mrs Isaak Angelos aproximadamente 1155, en İstanbul, Turquía. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1170, a la edad de 53 años.
